title: Need Jira tasks as subitems
excerpt: We need the Jira tasks to be created as subitems of the “Build” item on our project board.  I have managed to get the Jira tasks to create as items and then convert them to subitems using a marketplace app.  However, onc…

posts.author: mcouger (Mechele Couger)
posts.cookedHtml:
We need the Jira tasks to be created as subitems of the “Build” item on our project board. I have managed to get the Jira tasks to create as items and then convert them to subitems using a marketplace app. However, once they are subitems, they no longer sync from Jira.
IAs a workaround, I set up a board specifically to hold the Jira tasks as items and manually create the corresponding subitems on the project board. Then, I thought we could use mirror columns to keep the items on this extra board synced to subitems on my project board. However, the mirror column on the project board subitem isn’t syncing from the item on the extra board

posts.author: LukeHGA (Luke Hanson)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am having the exact same issue. I do not want to keep them all at item level as it is leaving my board extremely messy. Have you found a solution to this?

Thanks

posts.author: Fortimus_Team (Fortimus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @mcouger @LukeHGA ,

Our Mirror item Multiple Boards app allows you to add the same item and subitems on multiple boards. You can also add the subitem as an item and auto-create subitems based on your workflow needs.

The app keeps your items and subitems in sync. Once you have the jira tasks in monday, I’m sure I can help you keep the items/subitems in sync.

Feel free to reach out to us at support@fortimus.co for a further discussion.

posts.author: kevinfantasymedia (Kevin - Fantasy Media LTD)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @mcouger @LukeHGA

Great news — there’s a pretty simple way to handle this.

If you already have:

  • One board with your original items (from Jira)
  • Another board where those items exist as subitems

You can keep both boards connected and fully in sync.

The setup creates a 2-way sync, so any change you make in one board (on any column) is automatically reflected in the other. This makes it much easier to keep everything aligned without manual updates.

All you need is a single automation from the Connected Boards Automations app:

image2416×882 144 KB

Connected Boards Automations

monday.com

Connected Boards Automations - monday.com Marketplace

Connect Items & Sync Values Across Boards. Automatically.

Once it’s set up, both boards will stay synced automatically going forward.
If you have any questions or need help setting things up, feel free to reach out anytime: hello@fantasymedia.io
